name: Spatial
description: Spatial vocabulary for tracking where things are. A Positionable is anything whose location can be tracked. It HAS a Position (a value-snapshot of where it is). The Position resolves to a Location AT some place. Both Position and Location IS-A Attribute, so they share the attribute value-space and can participate in OF / UPDATES chains for tracking changes over time. This bundle is the home of all locative concepts — bundle-cards depends on it for Position and Location.
